description: This file defines the SessionRepository class responsible for managing in-memory authentication session state in a Kotlin Android project. It provides methods for updating and observing authentication states, which include logged out, locked, and unlocked states, with session tokens and reasons. It acts as a single source of truth for UI components regarding authentication status, while persistence is handled separately.

classes.name: SessionRepository
classes.description: A repository class that manages in-memory authentication session state using a MutableStateFlow. It provides observable flow of auth state, methods to set different session statuses, and retrieve current session info.

methods.name: stateFlow
methods.description: Returns a StateFlow of the current AuthState for observing session state changes.

methods.name: setLoggedOut
methods.description: Sets the current session state to LoggedOut.

methods.name: setLocked
methods.description: Sets the session state to Locked with associated session tokens and unlock reason.

methods.name: setUnlocked
methods.description: Sets the session state to Unlocked with associated session tokens.

methods.name: currentTokensOrNull
methods.description: Returns the current session tokens if the session is unlocked or locked; otherwise, null.
